title: neillia intermedia
intro: Neillia intermedia, also known as Chinese neillia or golden neillia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a deciduous shrub that has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Neillia intermedia is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
